name: Chicken and Vegetable Casseroles
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Zucchini, cut into 1/4 inch slices
1 Sm Tomato, cut into thin wedges
1 T Snipped fresh Basil or 1/8 t dried basil, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the onion and separate it into rings.
2. Crush the fresh basil leaves by hand until finely chopped.
3. In a large bowl, combine the zucchini slices, sliced onion, tomato wedges, olives, parsley, basil (or dried basil), garlic powder, chicken breast halves, and margarine.
4. Divide the mixture evenly between two individual casseroles or au gratin dishes.
5. Top each casserole with a chicken breast half.
6. Dot the chicken breasts with a small amount of margarine.
7. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the chicken breasts (about 1/8 teaspoon each).
8. Cover the casseroles and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 40 minutes, or until the chicken is no longer pink.
Per serving: 200 calories, 28 g protein, 7 g carbohydrates, 6 g fat, 72 mg cholesterol, 295 mg sodium, 635 mg potassium.
